release.name: n8n@2.18.5
release.body:
## [2.18.5](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/compare/n8n@2.18.4...n8n@2.18.5) (2026-04-28)


### Bug Fixes

* **ai-builder:** Hide and reap intermediate AI-created workflows ([#29344](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/29344)) ([1031603](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/1031603b0b53a250eea0cf13910b800f534b0a97))
* **editor:** Constrain InstanceAiView stacking context below sidebar ([#29335](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/29335)) ([6508bce](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/6508bce89b787d25aa599e85b7be805a6da1432d))
* **editor:** Disable WF version menu only when all actions are unavailable ([#29326](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/29326)) ([263f0b7](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/263f0b723e0019d699ebff9fc81dfd27e0d2ebd5))
* **editor:** Fix NDV not loading parameters panel if refreshed ([#28856](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/28856)) ([b6ce410](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/b6ce41023625653ec311a55f1a1af8c3a4e6a389))
* No Credits state for n8n Connect badge ([#29380](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/29380)) ([a53fbbf](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/a53fbbfc41904bf3e743137f84518034bf77b672))


### Features

* Add warning when publishing workflow, if some nodes in it are using ai gateway credentials ([#29174](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/29174)) ([acbf598](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/acbf59815b91f0b59abb891a6c36a49511426703))
* In the n8n Connect table on row click open execution related to that usage row ([#29195](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/29195)) ([f9b6b58](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/f9b6b580107ee80e3f52b5cceef37cbeea8c0861))
* **OpenAI Node:** Use dynamic model selection for image edit and update analyze model filter ([#29330](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/29330)) ([78c37ac](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/78c37ac0efd610271c1f42dbcc744cdf66ae7383))

items.rawText: **ai-builder:** Hide and reap intermediate AI-created workflows ([#29344](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/29344)) ([1031603](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/1031603b0b53a250eea0cf13910b800f534b0a97))

**editor:** Constrain InstanceAiView stacking context below sidebar ([#29335](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/29335)) ([6508bce](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/6508bce89b787d25aa599e85b7be805a6da1432d))

**editor:** Disable WF version menu only when all actions are unavailable ([#29326](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/29326)) ([263f0b7](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/263f0b723e0019d699ebff9fc81dfd27e0d2ebd5))

**editor:** Fix NDV not loading parameters panel if refreshed ([#28856](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/28856)) ([b6ce410](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/b6ce41023625653ec311a55f1a1af8c3a4e6a389))
No Credits state for n8n Connect badge ([#29380](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/29380)) ([a53fbbf](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/a53fbbfc41904bf3e743137f84518034bf77b672))

Add warning when publishing workflow, if some nodes in it are using ai gateway credentials ([#29174](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/29174)) ([acbf598](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/acbf59815b91f0b59abb891a6c36a49511426703))

In the n8n Connect table on row click open execution related to that usage row ([#29195](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/29195)) ([f9b6b58](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/f9b6b580107ee80e3f52b5cceef37cbeea8c0861))

**OpenAI Node:** Use dynamic model selection for image edit and update analyze model filter ([#29330](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/issues/29330)) ([78c37ac](https://github.com/n8n-io/n8n/commit/78c37ac0efd610271c1f42dbcc744cdf66ae7383))
